text:
The Character Song Collection: Phantom Troupe is a collection of songs sung by voice actors of the Hunter × Hunter 2011 anime. The fourth collection features prominent characters from the Yorknew City arc as well as the TV-size opening themes.

Songs

1/13 (Chrollo Lucilfer) (sung by Mamoru Miyano)
Threads - cruel spider - (Machi Komacine) (sung by Rena Maeda)
Departure! - Gon version - (Gon Freecss) (sung by Megumi Han)
Requiem Aranea -Electronic Dance Remix-
Departure! -second version- (TV-size) (sung by Masatoshi Ono)
